title: Crypto Transfer
description: Send ETH and SOL transfers in one click via MetaMask / Phantom wallets, with mainnet and testnet support

hint.walletMapping: ETH transfers go through MetaMask (your Ethereum account) and SOL transfers through Phantom (your Solana account). The card below shows the exact address that will sign the transaction — please verify before sending.
hint.notMetaMask: Heads up: the current ETH provider does not look like MetaMask (likely Phantom or another wallet in Ethereum mode). If you intended MetaMask, disable the other ETH wallet in your browser extensions and reload.

rpc.description: Public Solana mainnet RPCs (including the official api.mainnet-beta.solana.com) typically block dApp browser traffic. Grab a free RPC URL from Helius, QuickNode, Alchemy, or drpc.org and paste it here. It is saved only in your browser's localStorage.

errors.missingFields: Please fill in the recipient address and amount

code.invalid-address: Invalid recipient address, please make sure it is copied in full
code.invalid-amount: Invalid amount, please enter a valid number (e.g. 0.01)
code.sol-rpc-forbidden: Solana RPC returned 403 (Access forbidden). Public endpoints usually block dApp browser traffic. Paste your own RPC URL (Helius/QuickNode/Alchemy, etc.) below and try again.
code.sol-rpc-unreachable: All Solana RPC endpoints failed to connect. Check your network or configure a custom RPC.

footer.note: All signing happens locally in your wallet. This tool never touches your private keys. Please verify the flow on a testnet before using mainnet.
